queries: what is the cost of ivf
how much does treatment cost in mumbai
answer: A basic IVF cycle at our clinic is between one lakh fifty thousand to two lakh rupees. If you need IVF with ICSI, it ranges from two lakh to two lakh fifty thousand rupees. Medications can add an additional forty thousand to eighty thousand rupees. I recommend talking to the clinic directly for a personalized estimate.

queries: what is the process of ivf
answer: A standard IVF cycle takes about four to six weeks. It starts with tests and consultations, followed by ten to fourteen days of daily injections to stimulate the ovaries. After egg retrieval under sedation, the eggs are fertilized in the lab, and the best embryo is transferred back. A pregnancy test is done fourteen days later.

Most patients find the daily injections to be quite mild and easy to tolerate. The egg retrieval itself is performed under light sedation, so you won't feel any pain during the procedure. There might be some mild cramping afterwards, but it's very manageable.

Our success rates depend heavily on age. For women under thirty-five, it is about forty to fifty percent per cycle. For women between thirty-five and forty, it is thirty to forty percent, and for women over forty, it is fifteen to twenty-five percent. Success rates are cumulative over multiple cycles.

queries: how do i book an appointment
do i need to book an appointment
answer: You can reach out to the clinic directly to book or manage appointments. Please call us at plus nine one nine eight six seven four four one five eight nine, or email Dr. Malpani at drmalpani at drmalpani dot com. We will be happy to help you set up a convenient time.

No, bed rest is not required after the embryo transfer. You can resume normal, gentle daily activities immediately. Medical studies have shown that strict bed rest does not increase the success rates of IVF, so please don't worry about staying in bed.

Yes, absolutely! We welcome patients from all over India and abroad. The clinic can help coordinate and plan the timing of your visits so that you only need to be in Mumbai for the essential parts of the treatment cycle.
